allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''version:'''', d.get\(''''version''''\)\); print\(''''peerDeps:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''peerDependencies'''',{}\), indent=2\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''main:'''', d.get\(''''main''''\)\); print\(''''source:'''', d.get\(''''source''''\)\)")
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); deps=d.get\(''''dependencies'''',{}\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in deps.items\(\)}, indent=2\)\)")
